┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┳━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ Role                 ┃ Description                                           ┃
┡━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━╇━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┩
│ section-investigator │ Map one subsystem deeply and surface local leverage   │
│                      │ points.                                               │
│ scout                │ Gather inspiration from repo artifacts, peers,        │
│                      │ papers, trends, and the web.                          │
│ synthesizer          │ Link multiple sections and observations into          │
│                      │ cross-cutting opportunities.                          │
│ hypothesis-agent     │ Propose multiple competing improvement angles for one │
│                      │ opportunity.                                          │
│ experiment-agent     │ Run one bounded experiment and capture concrete       │
│                      │ evidence.                                             │
│ publisher            │ Turn deep investigations into structured              │
│                      │ publications.                                         │
│ challenger           │ Retest or disprove prior claims and stale             │
│                      │ assumptions.                                          │
│ refiner              │ Simplify promising experiments into promotion         │
│                      │ candidates.                                           │
│ promotion-agent      │ Prepare bounded branches, commits, and PR payloads    │
│                      │ with evidence.                                        │
│ archivist            │ Archive weak or superseded work so it is not retried  │
│                      │ blindly.                                              │
└──────────────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

step_results.stdout:
Verifier routing and promotion evidence should stay aligned.

Findings
- Scoped verifier routing lowers noise.
- Promotion artifacts need explicit evidence sections.

Open Questions
- How strict should promotion evidence be?

Sources
